pi_items.source: Explicitly required in the task description and verifier.py checks outgoing drafted emails for this address.
setup_task.sh defines TOTAL_UNIQUE=25 and successfully copies exactly 25 unique files from the asset directory into the inbox.
Calculated internally by setup_task.sh combining the 25 unique emails and 8 generated duplicates (totaling 33 items inserted into the initial Maildir).
setup_task.sh defines a list of exactly 8 indices (DUPLICATE_INDICES) and iterates through to create duplicate files.
setup_task.sh defines DUPLICATE_INDICES=(2 6 10 14 18 21 23 24) representing 0-based indices in the loop processing sorted assets; this maps precisely to the 1-based logical indices claimed.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real emails originating from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus. According to the setup scripts, exactly 25 unique emails are generated in the inbox, with 8 specific ones duplicated (the 3rd, 7th, 11th, 15th, 19th, 22nd, 24th, and 25th emails in chronological loop order), bringing the initial inbox count to 33. The agent is expected to draft a final incident report precisely to 'it-infrastructure@company.com' as enforced by the evaluation script.
